title: The Death Ray of Dr. Mabuse
writer: Ladislas Fodor, Norbert Jacques, Alexander Welbat
actors: Peter van Eyck, O.E. Hasse, Yvonne Furneaux
plot: British Secret Service agent Major Anders is dispatched to Malta to investigate Professor Larsen, who has invented a powerful weapon of mass-destruction, a death ray machine on his island.
